scenario: Per-mile pricing — requires distance lookup for total cost comparison
subject: RE: Rate for Dallas-ATL Flatbed
body:
Hi,

We can do this at $3.65/mile. Dallas to Atlanta is approximately 781 miles so that comes out to roughly $2,850.65.

Includes FSC. Tarps included no extra charge.

Can pick up 4/15, deliver 4/17.

Sunbelt Freight
(214) 555-0876
